commonIssues.heading: Common Plumbing Issues in Austin
commonIssues.body: Austin's expansive clay soil shifts with weather cycles and puts stress on foundations and buried plumbing lines. Combined with very hard water, that movement often leads to slab leaks, fixture scale buildup, and premature wear on water heaters in older and mid-century homes.

faqs.question: Why are slab leaks so common in Austin?
faqs.answer: Clay soil expansion and contraction creates long-term stress on underground lines, especially in older neighborhoods with aging copper or cast-iron systems.
